Albert Junior
Private Advisor · Tokyo Resident Since 1997
Why Me

Not a Guide.
Your Insider.
Your Fixer.

I came to Tokyo nearly 30 years ago — not on assignment, not as a tourist. I chose this city and never left. Three decades of navigating Japan's systems, relationships, and unwritten rules have given me something no guide service can manufacture: genuine insider access.

I know which Michelin-starred counter has a cancellation tonight. I know the doctor who sees international patients at 10pm. I know how to turn a business introduction into a partnership — in Japanese — while you focus on what matters.

Your man in Tokyo. Since 1997.
01
30 Years of Continuous Residence
Not visits. Three decades of daily life in Tokyo — through the systems, the seasons, and the unwritten social contracts that no guidebook captures.
02
The Foreigner Who Belongs Here
Trusted by locals as someone who truly understands Japan. Understood by internationals who need a familiar perspective. I operate in both worlds simultaneously.
03
A Network Built Over Decades, Not Directories
Real relationships across hospitality, medical, legal, real estate, and business — cultivated over 30 years. Cannot be replicated by any app, agency, or newcomer.
04
You Speak to Me Directly. Always.
Not a call centre. Not an assistant. When you contact Private Tokyo Advisor, you reach the person who will personally handle your situation.
05
Hyperlocal Knowledge — Not Just "Tokyo"
I know the best counter in every neighbourhood, the history behind every backstreet, and the better alternative to every tourist recommendation — instantly.
🔒
Confidentiality & NDA: All client information is kept strictly private. A formal Non-Disclosure Agreement is available upon request for executives, public figures, and high-profile clients.

Personalisation

"Customisable" Is Not
Enough. This Is Bespoke.

📋
The Pre-Arrival Briefing
Before you land, I know your dietary restrictions, sleep preferences, business interests, cultural sensitivities, physical limitations, and what you hope to feel by the time you leave. Your itinerary is designed around who you are — not a template.
🔍
Depth, Not Just Destinations
Every street has a story. Every recommendation comes with three alternatives. En route to any destination, I can tell you its history, the better option two blocks away, and the thing nobody else will mention. This is what 30 years of living somewhere actually looks like.
🎯
Interest-Specific Tokyo
Architecture. Contemporary art. Traditional craft. Finance. Food science. Fashion. Whatever your lens — I design Tokyo around it. This city is inexhaustible when you have the right guide to its depth.
⚡
Real-Time Adaptation
Plans change. A restaurant is full. The weather turns. A business meeting runs over. I hold reserve options for every situation and adapt instantly — so your experience remains seamless regardless of what happens.

How It Works

Simple, Discreet,
Effective.

01
Reach Out
WhatsApp, email, the form below, or book a free 15-minute consultation call. No formalities required — describe your situation in your own words.

Everything handled locally, personally, and discreetly. Followed through until your situation is completely and satisfactorily resolved.

FAQ

Questions We
Hear Most Often.

Is confidentiality guaranteed? Is an NDA available? +
Absolute confidentiality is the non-negotiable foundation of everything we do. Your name, plans, arrangements, and identity are never shared under any circumstances. For executives, public figures, and high-profile clients, a formal Non-Disclosure Agreement is available upon request before any engagement begins.
What types of payment do you accept? +
We accept international bank transfer (JPY, USD, EUR, GBP), major credit cards including Amex and Black Cards, cryptocurrency (BTC, ETH, USDT), and corporate invoice with Net-30 terms. For significant engagements, escrow arrangements are available. We aim to make payment as frictionless as possible.
How quickly can you respond to emergencies? +
The emergency line is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including public holidays. For genuine urgent situations, I typically respond within 15–30 minutes and can deploy or begin coordinating within the hour.
Can you arrange private transport — including helicopter? +
Yes. We coordinate private hire cars (Tesla, Alphard, Lexus LS), executive vans, and helicopter charters for scenic flights over Tokyo or inter-city transfers. Shinkansen Green Car arrangements and airport meet-and-greet services are also available.
What if my needs don't fit one of your listed plans? +
Every engagement is bespoke. The listed plans are starting points and reference prices — in practice, every client's arrangement is designed from scratch around their specific situation, interests, schedule, and budget. Book the free 15-minute consultation and describe what you have in mind.
Do you work with corporate clients and family offices? +
Yes. We regularly support international corporations, private equity firms, family offices, and high-net-worth individuals operating in or entering the Japanese market. Ongoing advisory retainer arrangements are available for clients requiring regular support.
